arts.ttl: Gasperini's substitutions have immediate impact as Atalanta beats Cagliari to stay atop Serie A
arts.sum: Gasperini’s substitutions had an immediate impact as Atalanta won 1-0 at lowly Cagliari on Saturday to ensure it will end the weekend top of the Serie A table. Gasperini, who has been in charge of Atalanta for eight years, won the coach-of-the-year award in 2019 and 2020.

arts.ttl: Atalanta aiming to carry on pushing in Cagliari
arts.sum: After a streak of four away wins in a row for Atalanta, Cagliari won in their last home game against the Nerazzurri in Serie A (2-1 in April). Roberto Piccoli grew up in the Atalanta youth academy and made his Serie A debut for the Nerazzurri (April 15, 2019 against Empoli) – in the three previous matches (three defeats) against the Bergamo side in the top flight he has scored a goal, in the first clash, for Spezia in March 2021.
